sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: KMI 2026년 1분기 순이익 9억 7,600만 달러, EPS 전년비 38% 급증

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 순이익 9억 7,600만 달러로 전년 동기 7억 1,700만 달러 대비 36% 증가했으며, Adjusted EPS는 0.48달러로 41% 상승했다.
영업현금흐름 15억 달러(전년비 +28%), 자본지출 차감 후 잉여현금흐름(FCF) 7억 달러(전년비 +73%)를 기록했다.

riskChanges.text: 중동 분쟁과 우크라이나 전쟁 등 지정학적 불확실성이 확대됐으나, 경영진은 수수료 기반 계약 구조와 신용도 높은 화주 기반으로 인해 상품가격 변동성으로부터 대부분 절연되어 있다고 밝혔다.

businessChanges.text: Kinder Morgan의 COO인 James E. Holland가 September 4, 2026부로 은퇴 예정이며, Kenneth W. Grubb 부사장(Chief Project Officer)이 후임 COO로 선임되었다.
천연가스 파이프라인 부문이 2026년 1분기 실적 아웃퍼폼을 주도했으며, 겨울 폭풍 Fern과 장기간 한파가 수요 증가에 기여했다.
무디스로부터 신용등급 상향 조정을 받아 3대 신용평가사 모두 BBB+ 동급 등급을 부여하게 되었으며, 분기말 순부채/Adjusted EBITDA 비율은 3.6배를 유지했다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 순이익: 9억 7,600만 달러 (전년 동기: 7억 1,700만 달러), EPS 0.44달러(+38%), Adjusted EPS 0.48달러(+41%).
Adjusted EBITDA는 10억 6,300만 달러, DCF(분배가능현금흐름)는 25억 3,900만 달러를 기록했다.
분기 현금배당 주당 0.2975달러(연율 환산 1.19달러) 승인, 2025년 1분기 대비 2% 인상.
영업현금흐름 15억 달러(+28% YoY), FCF 7억 달러(+73% YoY)로 현금창출력이 대폭 강화되었다.

watchItems.text: COO 교체(September 2026)와 동시에 LNG 수출 수요 증가라는 구조적 성장 기회를 배경으로, 백로그 프로젝트 실행 역량이 향후 주가 촉매의 핵심 변수가 될 전망이다.
취득원가 상당한 자본 프로젝트를 내부자금으로 조달하면서도 FCF가 73% 급증했다는 점은 수익화 속도가 투자 속도를 앞질렀음을 시사한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 kmi2026q18-kex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 KINDER MORGAN REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS Substantial financial outperformance in the quarter Earnings per share (EPS) 38% greater than 2025; Adjusted EPS up 41% HOUSTON, April 22, 2026 - Kinder Morgan, Inc.’s (NYSE: KMI) board of directors today approved a cash dividend of $0.2975 per share for the first quarter ($1.19 annualized), payable on May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on May 4, 2026. This dividend is a 2% increase over the first quarter of 2025. KMI is reporting: • First quarter net income attributable to KMI of $976 million versus $717 million in the first  Normalized numeric aliases: $976 million = 9억 7,600만 달러; $717 million = 7억 1,700만 달러; $1,063 million = 10억 6,300만 달러; $2,539 million = 25억 3,900만 달러; $0.2975 = 0.2975달러; $1.19 = 1.19달러; $976 = 976달러; $717 = 717달러; $2,539 = 2,539달러; $1,063 = 1,063달러; 1,063 million = 10억 6,300만 달러; 2,539 million = 25억 3,900만 달러.

of 2025. • Earnings per share (EPS) of $0.44, up 38% versus the first quarter of 2025; and Adjusted EPS of $0.48, up 41% versus the first quarter of 2025. “The geopolitical landscape became even more turbulent this quarter, with conflict in the Middle East joining the ongoing war in Ukraine as a source of significant commodity price volatility,” said Executive Chairman Richard D. Kinder. “As a fee-based midstream energy company with highly creditworthy shippers, we are largely insulated from that volatility. Longer-term, these global conflicts highlight the benefits of securing liquified natural gas (LNG) supplies from the United States, driving incremental demand for the services we provide those shippers. And apart from geopolitics, projections for domestic natural gas demand growth, particularly in the power sector, continue to be robust. “We believe we will continue to thrive as a  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.44 = 0.44달러; $0.48 = 0.48달러.

by remaining disciplined and committed to our original strategy—owning high‑quality midstream energy assets supported by long‑term, take‑or‑pay, fee‑based contracts with creditworthy customers,” Kinder said. “This foundation gives us confidence in our ability to continue delivering consistent cash flows, attractive growth, and long‑term shareholder value for many years to come.” “For the quarter all of our business segments were well up, excluding Certain Items, versus the first quarter of 2025. Our Natural Gas Pipelines segment drove the bulk of that outperformance, benefiting from winter storm Fern and extended cold weather. The company delivered first quarter 2026 net income attributable to KMI of $976 million, 36% higher than the first quarter of 2025 — while Adjusted EPS and Adjusted EBITDA were 41% and 18% higher, respectively, than the first quarter of 2025,” said Chief  Normalized numeric aliases: $976 million = 9억 7,600만 달러; $976 = 976달러.

Officer Kim Dang. “In the first quarter, we continued to internally fund high-quality capital projects while generating cash flow from operations of $1.5 billion and free cash flow (FCF) after capital expenditures of $0.7 billion, up 28% and 73%, respectively, from the prior year period. Our balance sheet remains healthy, as we ended the quarter with a Net Debt-to-Adjusted EBITDA ratio of 3.6 times. “We were also pleased this quarter to receive an upgrade from Moody’s, which joined the other two rating agencies in classifying the company as the equivalent of BBB+. This is a recognition of the work so many in the company have done over the years to achieve robust earnings, strong projected growth, and a very healthy balance sheet,” continued Dang. “While our expansion projects and backlog receive quite a bit of attention, and deservedly so, this quarter’s outperformance is also a  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $0.7 billion = 7억 달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $0.7 = 0.7달러.

E. Holland, who has served as Chief Operating Officer of KMI since July 2020, plans to retire effective September 4, 2026 (the “Effective Date”), and Kenneth W. Grubb, KMI’s Vice President and Chief Project Officer, has been appointed by the Board of Directors of KMI to succeed Mr. Holland as Chief Operating Officer, effective as of the Effective Date. Mr. Grubb, age 58, has been with KMI or predecessor companies for more than 35 years and has held various positions in KMI’s Natural Gas Pipelines business segment. Previously, Mr. Grubb served as Chief Operating Officer of the Natural Gas Pipelines business segment from 2017 to 2025, and Vice President of Operations for the Western Region of the Natural Gas Pipelines business segment from 2012 to 2017. Over the course of his career in the energy sector, Mr. Grubb has also held various other roles in operations, engineering, system
